description_long: This is a portable record player with a retro suitcase-style design, featuring a blue lid and yellow base. The inside of the lid displays the phrase '#StandWithUkraine' in bold white letters. The turntable platter is black and occupies a large portion of the top surface, with a matching black tonearm resting to the right. The control panel, located on the front left, includes several knobs and switches for operation. The exterior is covered in textured material, with reinforced black corner protectors and metallic latches on the front. The back of the device is plain blue, with a small black panel for connectivity.
description: A blue and yellow suitcase-style record player with a black turntable platter, tonearm, and control knobs, featuring '#StandWithUkraine' on the inside lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open blue lid with '#StandWithUkraine', the black platter, tonearm, and control knobs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the player, the open blue lid, and the arrangement of the platter and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed blue back of the lid, black corner protectors, and a small black connectivity panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open lid, the platter, and the tonearm from a different angle, with the control panel partially visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and black, occupying a large central area of the player. It has a slightly raised edge and visible concentric grooves, with a matte finish and no additional markings.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, black, and straight with a rectangular cross-section. It is medium in length, positioned to the right of the platter, and appears to be resting in its holder. The finish is matte, and the base includes visible pivot and lift mechanisms.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is present, attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, metallic, and pointed, with a slight red accent, and appears as a distinct component at the tip of the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: There are several control knobs and switches on the front left panel. They are round, black, and of varying sizes, with a matte finish. Some have white markings or labels, and there are also a few small rectangular buttons.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present in the form of a blue, hard suitcase-style lid. It is opaque, made of synthetic leather over a rigid frame, and is attached with hinges at the back. The lid is currently open and features metallic latches and reinforced corners.
